SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Shauna L. Matlin, Esq., for the Plaintiff ANTHONY FAZIO, MARIE JOBLING, LINDA RASKIN CAMPILONGO.
Plaintiffs Anthony Fazio, Marie Jobling, Linda Raskin Campilongo sworn and examined on their own behalf.
No appearance by Defendant SANDRA TUCKER and MICHAEL MARTIN.

Court granted Plaintiff's counsel' request to conform to Proof the complaint to correct typographical error The fair rental value of the premises is $60.00 per day, not $40.00.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The rental agreement is canceled. The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 112 Fair Oaks Street, Apt. B, San Francisco, CA 94110.
Past-due rent $0.00
Holdover damages $3,600
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $640.00
for a Total Judgment of $4,240.00
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 3

Judge Pro Tem: Andy Westley; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D504A)

Appearances:

Plaintiff Anthony Fazio is present. Plaintiffs Marie Jobling and Linda R Campilongo are NOT present
Attorney Shauna Matlin of Matlin & Associates (415-305-5637) is present for the plaintiff.

Defendant Michael Martin is present. Defendant Sandra Tucker is NOT present.
Attorney Kyle Bassman of Ropes & Gray LLP (415-315-6323) is present for defendant Martin in limited scope.

-------

Over plaintiff counsel's objection due to non-appearance by one defendant, Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Room 504A. Counsel for plaintiffs indicates no settlement discussions can take place and makes repeated requests to be excused. The case is not settled. The trial date of JUN-30-2014 remains on calendar.
